title: Technic Robot Building Sets, 535PCS 5-IN-1 RC Robot and Car, Remote and App Controlled Building Kit, Rechargeable RC Building Block, Engineering Kits Toys Gifts for Teen Boys Age 8-12 13 14 15+
features: 【5-IN-1 Technic Building Set】: It has 5 models, Robot/bulldozer/bulldozer/road roller/crane transporter, and the five models have many movable parts, which make the building block toys have cool performance, exercise children's imagination, and develop children's creative thinking and hands-on ability

【Technic Remote Control Robot】: It has two control methods: remote control and app. Through the app, you can switch different driving modes (remote control mode/gyroscope mode/path mode/programming), and you can drive freely indoors and outdoors
【You Will Get】: 535PCS building blocks, 1× remote control (excluding 2×AAA batteries), 1× power module, 1×USB charging cable, 1×instruction manual, 1×sticker, 1×assistive tool, 1×Bag

【Well Designed】: All parts are made of safe and non-toxic materials, durable and smooth. The power module adopts a charging design, and there is no need to disassemble and install the battery, which makes charging more convenient

【A Great Gift for Children】: This 5-in-1 technical assembly set can inspire children's creativity and keep them busy for hours. It is very suitable as a birthday and Christmas gift for children aged 8-12 13 14 15+
description: From the brand Why Choose AYIQUTY? AYIQUTY hopes that children can get happiness and growth from toys. Previous page Remote Control Toys Remote Control Toys Remote Control Toys Next page
